stories.headline: NJ BPU Cancels Larrabee Transmission Agreement with PJM as Offshore Wind Pipeline Collapses
stories.summary: The Sherrill-administration BPU on April 23 voted to scrap the 2021 Larrabee Pre-Built Infrastructure deal with PJM after offshore wind projects were canceled or stalled by the White House.

stories.headline: Shapiro Tests Political Muscle in PA Midterms
stories.summary: Gov. Josh Shapiro is leveraging his political operation to flip the state legislature and shape the Democratic congressional slate, as HMP and CLF pour millions into PA's four big races.

stories.headline: Garrity Blocks $1M Treasury Payment for Shapiro Residence Security
stories.summary: PA Treasurer (and likely GOP gubernatorial nominee) Stacy Garrity refused to pay for security upgrades at Shapiro's private home, saying Treasury lacks legal authority to fund private property.

stories.headline: Brooks Up 7 in PA-07 Democratic Primary; AOC Endorses Rabb in PA-03
stories.summary: PA Professional Fire Fighters president Bob Brooks leads the PA-07 Democratic primary by seven points; Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has endorsed state Rep. Chris Rabb in PA-03.

stories.headline: NERC Sounds Alarm on Sudden Data Center Load Losses
stories.summary: NERC flagged multiple 2024–2025 events where 1,000+ MW dropped off the grid in seconds and is pushing FERC Order 901-style ride-through standards for hyperscale loads.

stories.headline: DTE Files $474M Michigan Rate Case Tied to ~2.1 GW of Data Center Load
stories.summary: DTE Energy is seeking $474M from Michigan ratepayers to cover grid hardening and new generation for incoming AI data centers, raising the average residential bill ~$13/month.

stories.headline: U.S. Electricity Prices Rose 9% YoY in February
stories.summary: EIA data show February residential prices jumped 9% year-over-year — the steepest 12-month rise since 2022 — led by PJM (+14%) and ERCOT (+11%).

stories.headline: Patel Likely Next Cabinet-Level Official to Go, White House Source Tells Playbook
stories.summary: A senior White House official told Politico the FBI director's exit is "only a matter of time," with Trump fed up over the steady drumbeat of negative coverage of Kash Patel.

stories.headline: Witkoff and Kushner Head to Pakistan to Restart Iran Talks
stories.summary: VP Vance is on standby as the White House signals "some progress from the Iranian side" — even as Sen. Wicker calls for Trump to scrap the ceasefire and restart the war.

stories.headline: DOJ Drops Fed Renovation Probe, Clearing Path for Warsh Confirmation
stories.summary: Sen. Thom Tillis is expected to lift his hold on Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair after DOJ moved its inquiry into the Eccles Building renovation to the central bank's Inspector General.

stories.headline: Cherfilus-McCormick Resigns 10 Minutes Before Ethics Sanctions Hearing
stories.summary: The Florida Democrat — facing federal charges over diverted COVID-19 relief funds — stepped down minutes before the panel was set to recommend sanctions, instantly stripping it of jurisdiction.

stories.headline: Pirates 6, Brewers 0 — Skenes One-Hits Milwaukee, Griffin Goes Yard on 20th Birthday
stories.summary: Paul Skenes (4-1) carried a no-hit bid into the seventh, finishing 7 IP, 1 H, 0 R, 7 K, 0 BB; Konnor Griffin homered and drove in three on his 20th birthday as the Pirates moved to 15-11.
